title: Baker & Salt 6 Cup Jumbo Muffin Tin WSP0.38
description: This Non-Stick 6 Cup Jumbo Muffin Tin from the Baker & Salt range is perfect for cooking delicious moist muffins. The Baker & Salt range are well known for their high-quality kitchenware at sensible prices and this Muffin Tin is no exception.Manufactured to a very high standard from heavy-gauge steel means this tin will not warp and is safe to use in the oven up to 230°c. With Baker & Salts Double Non-Stick Coating for exceptional release, you can be sure that no scrubbing is required when cleaning.This Muffin Tin is dishwasher safe and can be placed directly in the freezer should there be any leftovers.10-year guarantee includedCup Diameter 9CMDimensions 34.5 x 23.5 x 5.5cmWeight 704g
